name: Illuminate Overseer | Helldivers 2
description:
I'm making one bot because I got to fight the Illuminate and rage because I suck. Just kidding, I had a blast even though I got constantly hit in the face by overseers. Anyways, I want to say she's an overseer, not sure though. Also, artist is Arzyparzy. I also like the artwork, really nice. A little bit of gore warning I guess as it the intro involves a grenade and B U L L E T, but it's not really descriptive much. I don't want it to be too much focused on combat, so I left it as she just bonks you and doesn't look happy in case you just want to try something random. At least she is giving you a chance to fight, so...

I honestly would not fight.

Here's an extra image too.
creator: LoneEcho
